items.description: Diagnose current portfolio risk using provided stress results and capture ratios; identify problem longs/shorts and concentration issues
Fetch larger ticker pool to source defensive substitutes and better hedges
Deep-dive 2-3 highest-risk tickers (e.g., ODD, CELH, COTY) for beta/drivers
Construct Portfolio V1 (rebalance weights, trim high beta longs, replace wrong-way shorts) targeting ~30% net long
Test V1 with stress_test() and get_upside_downside_ratios(); record worst-case drawdown and captures
Analyze V1 outcomes; identify which names/weights harm downside and correlation
Construct Portfolio V2 (adjust weights, swap 2-3 names to improve stress robustness) still ~30% net long
Test V2; compare to V1; track worst scenario loss, capture ratios, concentration, correlation
Construct Portfolio V3 (optimize short book to cushion credit/tariff/fed shocks; diversify longs) at ~30% net long
Test V3; ensure worst-case drawdown <10% and downside capture <15% while keeping upside >40%
Construct Portfolio V4 (fine-tune position sizes; reduce pairwise correlations) at ~30% net long
Test V4; confirm improvements vs V3 across multiple scenarios and captures
Validate constraints: 15-20 longs, 10-15 shorts, ~30% net long, improved downside and acceptable upside
Double-check any residual red flags; adjust marginally if needed (V5 if necessary)
Finalize portfolio and provide JSON output with reasons for adjustments
